title: File my 2026 Australian tax return
summary: myGov login, prefill review, deductions, lodge.

welcome.title: G'day
welcome.content: I'll walk you through your 2025-26 tax return. Tap-and-hold anywhere on the canvas to add a note, file, or reply. We'll go one step at a time.

ask_situation.title: Your situation this year
ask_situation.prompt: Briefly: what's your work situation? PAYG employee, sole trader, both? Investments, capital gains, crypto, rental property?

mygov_login.title: Log into myGov
mygov_login.handoffReason: Enter your username, password, and SMS code yourself. I never see them.

summarise_obligations.title: What I found
summarise_obligations.content: Your 2025-26 income statement is finalised. Prefilled data is available. No outstanding lodgments before this year.

ask_deductions.title: Anything to claim?
ask_deductions.prompt: Work-from-home hours, car kms, donations, professional fees, education, tools, subscriptions? Drop receipts on the canvas — I'll extract amounts.

decide_cgt.title: Capital gains?
decide_cgt.condition: ask_situation.value mentions stock, shares, crypto, or capital

cgt_collect.title: CGT events
cgt_collect.prompt: Upload your broker / exchange annual statement, or list disposals (asset, acquired date, sold date, proceeds, cost base).

review_prefill.title: Review prefilled return
review_prefill.handoffReason: Verify income, interest, dividends, and private health insurance look right.

confirm_lodge.title: Ready to lodge?
confirm_lodge.prompt: I'll submit your return. You can amend later through myGov. Confirm to lodge.

outcome.title: Lodged
outcome.content: Return lodged. The ATO normally confirms an estimated outcome within two weeks; I'll surface it here when it lands.
